message:
feat(ir): add traversal helpers for subgraph hierarchy and node membership

Add node_clusters, node_subgraphs, subgraph_ancestors, subgraph_descendants,
and subgraph_members_recursive methods to MermaidGraphIr, with comprehensive
tests for deterministic traversal order and round-trip serialization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
